name: Western Union
description_short: Omaha, NE's Western Union at 2929 N 60th St offers check cashing and money transfer services daily 8AM-9PM.
description_long:
The Western Union branch at 2929 N 60th St in Omaha, NE operates as a standalone check-cashing location open seven days a week from 8AM to 9PM. This Omaha location serves the north-central residential area and provides walk-in access to money transfer services throughout the week and weekends.

This Western Union location in Omaha, NE offers check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, and related financial services. To confirm specific service availability or inquire about rates, call 402-551-6151 before visiting the 2929 N 60th St branch.

If you're in Omaha and need check cashing or want to send money abroad, this NE location's 8AM-9PM hours work for weekday and weekend visits. Bring your government-issued ID, and you'll have access to reliable money transfer services.
pros: Extensive network of hundreds of agent locations across the US including Walmart and major retail/grocery chains
Fast in-person cash pickup service—recipients can access funds in minutes with MTCN and valid ID
Multiple payment methods accepted at participating locations: cash, debit cards, and credit cards at select sites
Online registration and mobile app option to start transfers ahead of time and pay in-person to reduce counter wait time
Prepaid Visa card option for receiving money with no minimum balance or credit check required
Established 170+ year track record with encryption and fraud prevention protections
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) available at participating agent locations alongside money transfers
cons: No in-person currency exchange services available at agent locations—international transfers use system exchange rates only
Service fees vary by transfer method and destination, requiring customers to use cost calculator to compare before sending
Agent location hours vary by hosting store/business, requiring individual lookup rather than standardized hours
Currently experiencing processing delays for payments to Orange Wallet in Cameroon, indicating potential service disruptions in specific corridors
Requires valid ID and recipient's name/ID information for all transfers, which may create friction for informal cash exchanges
best_for: People sending money to family or friends domestically or internationally who need fast in-person pickup options
Unbanked and underbanked consumers who prefer cash-based transactions and have limited access to traditional banking
Individuals who need to pay bills without a checking account or prefer in-person payment methods
International migrants and their families in countries with Western Union agent networks for reliable cross-border transfers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who need fast, accessible in-person money transfer and bill payment services without a bank account, particularly those sending money domestically or internationally. The main caveat is that fees vary significantly by transfer method and destination, so customers must use their cost calculator tool before sending, and processing delays can occur for certain international corridors.
services: International money transfers with real-time exchange rates
Cash pickup at agent locations using MTCN
Utility bill payments at participating locations
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card for receiving funds
Online transfer registration with in-person payment completion
Mobile app for transfer initiation and tracking
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
MTCN tracking system for transfer verification
meta_description: Omaha, NE Western Union at 2929 N 60th St. Check cashing and money transfers open 8AM-9PM daily.
